product_analysis: The product is a minimalist round smartwatch shown in a clean studio product render style. No visible brand name or logo is present on the watch body or strap. The watch has a circular silver metallic case with a smooth polished finish and a plain black inactive screen on the front. The bezel appears slim and uniform. The strap is a very light gray to white silicone or rubber material with a matte finish, standard buckle closure, and multiple oval adjustment holes. The buckle and connecting hardware appear metallic silver. The image shows two views: the main front-facing angled watch with black screen and the back side of the watch body with the matching strap. Overall design language is modern, sleek, neutral, premium, and minimal. Critical integrity details to preserve: exact round case shape, silver metal frame, plain black blank screen, light gray/white matte strap, silver buckle, hole placement style, no added logo, no extra buttons beyond those implied by the side profile, and the clean unbranded aesthetic. The product must remain visually identical to the reference image with no design alteration, no color shift, and no added text or branding.
